affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司“C”小队

backstory.original: Walnut is a child of the Enclave Panax Anima, an all-female clan of woodland defenders within the Kryptgarden Forest. Not only a frighteningly enthusiastic member of Acquisitions Incorporated, she also strives to protect the natural world by any means necessary. Did we mention she also has the goddess Mielikki living inside her? That seems important.
backstory.display: 沃纳特出生在一片叫做“参灵”的飞地，这是克瑞普花园森林中一个全由女性组成的林地保卫者氏族。她不仅是艾奎兹玄有限责任公司中一名充满激情的成员，还努力通过一切必要手段来保护自然世界。我们有没有提到，她体内还住着梅莉凯女神？这一点好像很重要。

description.original: Walnut savagely attacks the nearest enemy with her scimitar.
description.display: 沃纳特用她的弯刀野蛮地攻击距离最近的英雄。

description.original: Walnut summons a swarm of lovable forest friends to attack all enemies.
description.display: 沃纳特召唤出一群可爱的森林之友攻击全部敌人。

longDescription.original: Walnut summons a swarm of lovable forest friends to attack all enemies. Each enemy killed heals the party by 10% of their max health. If no enemies are killed, the formation gains a temporary hit point shield equal to 100% of their max health.
longDescription.display: 沃纳特召唤一群可爱的森林之友来攻击全部敌人。每击杀一名敌人，即为所有队伍成员回复 10% 最大生命值。如果未击杀任何敌人，所有队伍成员会获得等同于自身 100% 最大生命值的临时生命护盾。

conditions.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each enemy killed in this area. Resets when changing areas.
Increases the damage of adjacent champions and champions in the top or bottom of their column by $(not_buffed amount)% for each enemy killed in this area. Resets when changing areas.
Increases the damage of champions up to two slots away by $(not_buffed amount)% for each enemy killed in this area. Resets when changing areas.
Increases the damage of adjacent champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each enemy killed in this area. Resets when changing areas.
每在此区域击杀一名敌人，所有勇士的伤害就提升 $(not_buffed amount)%。改变区域时重置。
每在此区域击杀一名敌人，即提升所有相邻的勇士以及在其同列顶端或底部的勇士伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%。改变区域时重置。
每在此区域击杀一名敌人，即提升所有距离 2 格之内的勇士伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%。改变区域时重置。
每在此区域击杀一名敌人，即提升所有相邻的勇士伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%。改变区域时重置。

tipText.original: Walnut increases the damage of some Champions in the formation for each enemy killed.
tipText.display: 每当一名敌人死亡，沃纳特会使阵型中的部分勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: Adds a $amount% bonus to $(upgrade_name id) for $(duration) seconds when completing a quest or entering a completed area. Killing enemies in completed areas resets the duration to $duration seconds.
在完成一个任务或进入一个已完成的区域时，为$(upgrade_name id)提供 $amount% 加成，持续 $(duration) 秒。在已完成的区域中击杀敌人将把时长重置为 $duration 秒
$target uses Wild Shape to turn into a wolf whenever they are under attack, gaining $(round amount) temporary hit points for each enemy on-screen at the time of the transformation.
在受到攻击时，$target会使用自然变身转化为一匹狼，在转化时屏幕上每有一名敌人，即获得 $(round amount) 临时生命值

tipText.original: Walnut shapeshifts into a wolf when she is under attack, gaining a shield and becoming tankier.
tipText.display: 沃纳特受到攻击时变身为狼，获得护盾并成为坦克角色。

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of $source's maximum health. This effect is doubled when in wolf form.
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $(amount)%。处于狼形态时，此效果翻倍。
Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $amount% for every 2 seconds that $source is in wolf form. The buff decreases every 4 seconds while $source is not in wolf form.
当$source处于狼形态时，每 2 秒提升$(upgrade_name id)的效果 $amount%。$source不处于狼形态时，此增益每 4 秒削减
$(upgrade_name id) now also applies to all Champions within 2 slots of $source and is buffed by $amount%.
$(upgrade_name id)效果强化 $amount%，并对距离$source 2 格内的所有勇士生效

specializationDescription.original: Documancer reaches further into the formation, opening up more positioning options.
specializationDescription.display: 记录员效果范围扩大，提供更多位置选择。

description.desc: $(upgrade_name id) now also applies to all Champions in the top or bottom slots of each column and is buffed by $amount%.
$(upgrade_name id)效果强化 $amount%，并对每列顶端或底部的所有勇士生效

specializationDescription.original: Documancer applies to fixed slots in the formation, opening up even more positioning options.
specializationDescription.display: 记录员作用于阵型中的固定位置，并开放更多位置选项。

description.desc: $(upgrade_name id) now applies to all Champions but is not buffed.
$(upgrade_name id)对所有勇士生效，但效果不会得到强化

specializationDescription.original: Documancer applies to the entire formation, because positioning restrictions are for chumps.
specializationDescription.display: 记录员作用于整个阵型，因为只有蠢货才在乎位置限制。

description.desc: Each target of $(upgrade_name id) is buffed +$amount% for each of these buffs also affecting the target: K'Thriss' Unseen Encouragement, Donaar's Lead By Example, Rosie's Deflect Missiles.
如$(upgrade_name id)的目标拥有以下增益，则该目标将获得 $amount% 的强化：克里斯的无形鼓励、多纳尔的以身作则、罗茜的偏转飞弹。

specializationDescription.original: Documancer is buffed based on synergies with other "C" Team members.
specializationDescription.display: 记录员根据其他 C 小队队员的协同作用而得到强化。

description.desc: The effect of $(upgrade_name id) is increased by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with an affiliation other than the "C" Team.
除 C 小队成员外，阵型中每位拥有从属组织的勇士，均使$(upgrade_name id)的技能效果提高$amount%

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Documancer is buffed based on the presence of Champions from other (less famous) teams.
specializationDescription.display: 记录员根据来自其他（非著名）队伍的勇士数量而得到强化。

description.original: Why do I always gotta be the leader?
description.display: 为什么我总是要成为首领？

description.original: I have a bad feeling about this. Er, I mean. Go team!
description.display: 我感觉不妙，呃，我是说，队员们，冲啊！

description.original: Someday we're going to make something of ourselves.
description.display: 总有一天，我们自己会做到一些事。

description.original: Us wolves aren't easy to take down.
description.display: 我们是狼，不会被轻易打倒。

description.original: This fur's thicker than you'd think.
description.display: 这皮毛比你想得要厚实。

description.original: What's a few extra enemies? Easy!
description.display: 多几个敌人怎么样？小意思！

description.original: You have but to ask. We've got it all on file.
description.display: 你只要开口说一句就行。我们都记下来了。

description.original: It's only hoarding when you don't need them anymore.
description.display: 只有在不需要它们的时候，才算是囤积。

description.original: The Fixers need to understand our system!
description.display: 调停人需要理解我们的系统！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Walnut is a child of the Enclave Panax Anima, an all-female clan of woodland defenders within the Kryptgarden Forest. Not only a frighteningly enthusiastic member of Acquisitions Incorporated, she also strives to protect the natural world by any means necessary. Did we mention she also has the goddess Mielikki living inside her? That seems important.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Walnut buffs the party based on the number of enemies recently killed, and can transform into a wolf to help hold off enemies attacking the formation.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 沃纳特出生在一片叫做“参灵”的飞地，这是克瑞普花园森林中一个全由女性组成的林地保卫者氏族。她不仅是艾奎兹玄有限责任公司中一名充满激情的成员，还努力通过一切必要手段来保护自然世界。我们有没有提到，她体内还住着梅莉凯女神？这一点好像很重要。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 沃纳特会根据最近击杀的敌人数量为队伍提供增益，并且能变身成狼，帮助抵挡进攻阵型的敌人。
